title: Junior Investment Banker at L&T Finance Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at L&T Finance Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, L&T Finance Capital India in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance Capital India:
L&T Finance Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
